description: Style Note Lightweight and stylish, this T-shirt from adidas is comfortable and looks great. Engineered with Climalite technology this tee will ensure that you are dry and comfortable all day long. Pair it with denims on a day out in the sun or with shorts and sport shoes for your workout sessions. Product Details Sea green printed T-shirt, has a round neckline, short sleeves, a band at the hemline to give you a better Fit and branding above the hemline Material and Care 90% polyester and 10% lycra Machine wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, tumble dry, bleach, iron or dry clean Dry in shade Cold iron; do not iron on print or decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8” and chest 33") is wearing a size M
